Standard Monocrystalline (20%).description: Standard efficiency monocrystalline panel. Loses 0.4% output per degree C over 25C.

Premium High-Efficiency (22%).description: Premium panel with higher efficiency and better heat tolerance.

Value Polycrystalline (16%).description: Cost-effective legacy polycrystalline panel, requiring more space.

Thin Film (12%).description: Flexible thin-film with lower baseline efficiency but excellent heat resistance.
